title: stipa austromongolica
intro: Stipa austromongolica, also known as Mongolian feather grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of China and Mongolia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are said to help with wound healing and skin conditions. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Stipa austromongolica can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat a range of ailments in traditional Chinese medicine.
